task_completion.description: Log in to the FreeScout application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout dashboard or mailbox interface is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Open the correct conversation in the Network Support mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation titled 'VPN connection drops intermittently from Building C' from customer Marcus Rivera is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the option to add an internal note instead of a reply
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Note' tab or button is selected in the conversation editor (often indicated by a lock icon, yellow color, or 'Add Note' text), ensuring the message will not be sent to the customer.

task_completion.description: Draft the note with the required troubleshooting details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the required phrases: '10.0.3.1', 'Gi1/0/24', 'CRC errors', 'patch cable', and 'maintenance window'.

task_completion.description: Successfully post the internal note to the conversation thread
task_completion.visual_evidence: The internal note appears in the conversation history. It should be visually distinct from a standard reply (e.g., having a yellow background, a 'Note' label, or a lock icon) confirming it is internal.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the FreeScout web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not send a reply to the customer
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no new standard replies (messages sent to the customer) added to the conversation thread. Only an internal note should be added.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application
integrity.visual_evidence: The text was typed into the FreeScout conversation editor, not a separate text file, notepad, or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Mailbox: 'Network Support'. Target Conversation Subject: 'VPN connection drops intermittently from Building C'. Customer: Marcus Rivera (marcus.rivera@acmecorp.com). The agent MUST create an Internal Note (thread type 2), which typically has a distinct visual style in FreeScout (e.g., yellow background, lock icon) compared to a standard reply. The note MUST contain all of the following exact phrases: '10.0.3.1', 'Gi1/0/24', 'CRC errors', 'patch cable', and 'maintenance window'. The agent MUST NOT send a reply to the customer (thread type 3 is forbidden).
